texto: Fantastic accomplishments seem like something unattainable and everyone doing the extraordinary seems to be unlike you until YOU do something amazing. Then you realize those talented, heroic leaders are not different from you in any important way." Clara Branon, Ph.D., "This Is/Is Not the Way I Thought Things Would Change," Volume III, "The Spanners Series
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sally Ember: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “Fantastic accomplishments seem like something unattainable and everyone doing the extraordinary s…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, multiverse, romance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e romance.

texto: ESPE: So, in both conversations, Lama Sangyay steers you away from thinking directly about Epifanio or your relationship (or lack thereof) and right into the nature of your mind. So masterful.CLARA: Isn't he? I hate those instructions. I do not want to do those contemplations. I want Epifanio!ESPE [laughing]: Of course you do. How does it feel to want?CLARA: "Et tu, Brute?"ESPE: Oh, sí, Señora. ¡Yo también!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Sally Ember que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “ESPE: So, in both conversations, Lama Sangyay steers you away from thinking directly about Epifan…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, clara-branon, multiverse, com foco em humor e multiverse.
